{
  "account_type": "DEMO",
  "username": "",
  "password": "",

  "account_id": "",
  "market_search": "Japan 225",
  "epic": "IX.D.NIKKEI.IFM.IP",
  "auto_trade_enabled": true,
  "dry_run": false,
  "learning_enabled": true,
  "trade_size": 1.0,
  "currency_code": "USD",
  "one_position_per_epic": false,
  "cooldown_seconds": 180,
  "adaptive_execution_enabled": true,
  "adaptive_min_adjusted_confidence": 72,
  "adaptive_max_entry_spread": 35,
  "adaptive_atr_risk_enabled": true,
  "adaptive_atr_risk_multiple": 2.5,
  "adaptive_min_risk_points": 30,
  "adaptive_max_risk_points": 90,
  "adaptive_high_confidence": 90,
  "adaptive_high_confidence_reward_multiple": 3.0,
  "adaptive_min_setup_trades": 6,
  "dynamic_stop_floor_enabled": true,
  "dynamic_stop_floor_min": 8,
  "adaptive_good_winrate": 0.6,
  "adaptive_bad_winrate": 0.55,
  "adaptive_good_setup_reward_multiple": 2.4,
  "adaptive_bad_setup_reward_multiple": 1.4,
  "adaptive_good_setup_size_multiplier": 3.0,
  "adaptive_bad_setup_size_multiplier": 0.2,
  "adaptive_min_trade_size": 0.01,
  "adaptive_max_trade_size": 50,
  "breakeven_enabled": true,
  "breakeven_trigger_points": 30,
  "max_position_age_minutes": 480,
  "breakeven_offset_points": 0,
  "breakeven_once_per_position": true,
  "adaptive_trailing_stop_enabled": true,
  "adaptive_trailing_trigger_points": 50,
  "adaptive_trailing_distance_points": 25,
  "resolution": "MINUTE_1",
  "refresh_seconds": 5,
  "ohlc_strict_local_cache_first": true,
  "ohlc_local_cache_max_bars": 5000,
  "ohlc_local_cache_notes": [
    "When true, bootstrap reads src/data/ohlc_cache/*.jsonl first and skips IG/Yahoo if >=100 bars exist.",
    "On error.public-api.exceeded-account-historical-data-allowance, fall back to local cache only."
  ],
  "max_live_quotes": 3000,
  "signal_threshold": 55,
  "confidence_floor": 55,
  "confidence_floor_recovery_per_win": 1.0,
  "confidence_floor_notes": [
    "Bootstrap phase complete. Both signal_threshold and confidence_floor set to 80.",
    "Trades at <80% score zero points so can't exit CAUTION \u2014 80 is the effective floor.",
    "HEALTHY threshold lowered from 10 to 6 pts so marginal-band wins accumulate faster."
  ],
  "signal_threshold_notes": [
    "Pre-filter floor in signal engine AND minimum for gate. Set equal to confidence_floor during bootstrap.",
    "Effective floor: max(confidence_floor + bootstrap_wins, CONF_MARGINAL_MIN=80) in HEALTHY/CAUTION",
    "Bootstrap: starts at 75, rises +1 per win, capped at 80 automatically",
    "WARNING state requires 92 (CONF_HIGH). STOP state halts all entries."
  ],
  "auto_flatten_on_session_end": true,
  "risk_points": 40,
  "reward_multiple": 2.0,
  "fast_ema": 9,
  "slow_ema": 21,
  "rsi_period": 14,
  "rsi_buy_min": 58,
  "rsi_sell_max": 45,
  "atr_period": 14,
  "min_atr_points": 20,
  "max_atr_points": 0,
  "vol_regime_filter_enabled": false,
  "max_consecutive_losses": 5,
  "circuit_breaker_pause_minutes": 60,
  "max_spread": 35,
  "momentum_gap_points": 20,
  "learning_min_trades_per_setup": 10,
  "USE_ML_SIGNAL": true,
  "trading_hours_enabled": true,
  "trading_session_whitelist": [
    "asia_early",
    "london_morning",
    "london_us_overlap",
    "us_afternoon"
  ],
  "learning_max_bonus": 8,
  "learning_max_penalty": 15,
  "journal_file": "src/data/trade_journal.csv",
  "learning_db": "src/data/learning_db.sqlite3",
  "closed_trades_display_limit": 50,
  "telegram_enabled": false,
  "telegram_bot_token": "",
  "telegram_chat_id": "",
  "$schema": "./config_schema.json",

    ]
  }

{
  "$schema": "./config_schema.json",
  "$extends": "config_v25.json",
  "version": "26.0.0",
  "_note": "v26 profitability overlay \u2014 merge with config_v25.json at load time (not yet wired in v25.6)",
  "capital_envelope": {
    "account_balance_gbp": 10000,
    "max_margin_pct": 0.2,
    "max_concurrent_risk_gbp": 1200,
    "max_daily_risk_deployed_gbp": 8000,
    "max_daily_loss_gbp": 500,
    "max_daily_profit_target_gbp": 1000,
    "min_available_gbp": 100,
    "reserve_pct": 0.1
  },
  "expectancy": {
    "min_trades_per_setup": 20,
    "ban_wr_below": 0.45,
    "probe_until_trades": 30,
    "active_wr_min": 0.52,
    "rolling_days": 14
  },
  "s2_momentum": {
    "default_min_range_pct": 0.0008,
    "epic_overrides": {}
  },
  "trailing_stop": {
    "trail_trigger_atr_multiple": 0.75,
    "trail_distance_atr_multiple": 1.5,
    "epic_overrides": {},
    "_note": "Per-epic values from scripts/v26_trail_tune.py \u2192 data_lake/state/trail_epic_overrides.json"
  },
  "s4_ml_meta": {
    "enabled": true,
    "models_dir": "data_lake/models/s4",
    "min_decided_rows": 30,
    "min_val_wr": 0.52,
    "val_holdout_pct": 0.2
  },
  "ml_veto": {
    "enabled": true,
    "use_s4_models": true,
    "mode": "veto",
    "_note": "EUR/USD only \u2014 S4 veto-eligible after 6-bar label refresh (val WR 54.0%). Whitelist via per_epic.",
    "min_labelled_rows": 500,
    "min_probability": 0.58,
    "min_probability_high_conf": 0.55,
    "setup_specific_thresholds": true,
    "blend_fallback": false,
    "per_epic": {}
  },
  "shadow_service": {
    "enabled": true,
    "tail_poll_sec": 2.0,
    "snapshot_refresh_minutes": 60,
    "skip_in_pytest": true,
    "catch_up_on_start": true,
    "persist_offsets": true
  },
  "learning": {
    "label_horizon": "6bar"
  },
  "s1_rules": {
    "independent_enabled": true,
    "independent_threshold": 72
  },
  "portfolio_gate": {
    "enabled": true
  },
  "risk_bands": {
    "enabled": true,
    "entry_confidence_floor": 55,
    "probe_max_confidence": 80,
    "full_size_min_confidence": 85,
    "probe_risk_gbp_min": 50,
    "probe_risk_gbp_max": 80,
    "core_size_multiplier": 0.65,
    "_note": "Probe 55\u201380% \u2192 \u00a350\u201380 risk; core 80\u201385% \u2192 0.65\u00d7; full \u226585% (operator override floor 55%)"
  },
  "correlation_guard": {
    "max_concurrent_us_index_shorts": 1,
    "max_open_positions_global": 2,
    "us_index_epics": [
      "IX.D.DOW.IFM.IP",
      "IX.D.NASDAQ.IFM.IP"
    ]
  },
  "regime": {
    "calendar_enabled": true,
    "calendar_file": "config/calendar.json",
    "calendar_block_minutes_before": 15,
    "calendar_block_minutes_after": 15,
    "live_vol_soft_gate": true,
    "atr_percentile_block_above": 95,
    "index_epics": [
      "IX.D.DOW.IFM.IP",
      "IX.D.NASDAQ.IFM.IP"
    ],
    "extreme_vol_confidence_penalty_pct": 15,
    "same_direction_soft_cap": 1,
    "max_same_direction_risk_gbp": 400
  },
  "pilot": {
    "primary_epic": "IX.D.DOW.IFM.IP",
    "target_wr": 0.6,
    "target_rrr": 2.5,
    "review_days": 7,
    "_note": "DOW pilot \u2014 track via feeder threshold_pass + feature store"
  },
  "milestones": {
    "current": "M0",
    "daily_target_gbp": 0,
    "prove_days": 14,
    "targets": {
      "M1": 100,
      "M2": 250,
      "M3": 500,
      "M4": 1000
    }
  },
  "gate_relaxations": {
    "enabled": true,
    "fitness_min": 52,
    "warning_confidence_cap": 85,
    "warning_use_instrument_threshold": true,
    "epics": [
      "IX.D.DOW.IFM.IP",
      "IX.D.NASDAQ.IFM.IP"
    ],
    "require_points_healthy": false,
    "_note": "14d demo soak: fitness 52% on indices; WARNING cap 85% (not 92%); fitness relax applies in WARNING too"
  },
  "certification": {
    "max_soak_days": 14,
    "l1_window_days": 14,
    "l1_min_days": 14,
    "l1_median_daily_gbp": 100,
    "l1_min_pct_stretch_days": 0.21,
    "l1_stretch_day_gbp": 250,
    "l1_max_drawdown_gbp": 500,
    "l1_ohlc_wr_min": 0.52,
    "l4_window_days": 14,
    "l4_median_daily_gbp": 100,
    "l4_min_profit_factor": 1.2,
    "l4_min_trading_days": 7,
    "l5_window_days": 14,
    "l5_days_required": 10,
    "l5_daily_target_gbp": 250,
    "_note": "Max 14d soak \u2014 historical edge from OHLC replay (L2), not a 90d calendar wait"
  }
}
